ddls:
CREATE TABLE "earthquake_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earthquake event */,
  "rup_mag" REAL /* Magnitude of the earthquake (Richter scale) */,
  "rup_rake" REAL /* Rake angle of the earthquake rupture (degrees) */,
  "dist_rrup" REAL /* Distance from the site to the rupture (km) */,
  "site_vs30" REAL /* Shear wave velocity at 30 meters depth (m/s) */,
  "site_z1pt0" REAL /* Depth to the bedrock at 1.0 km/s (km) */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., MEAN, MEDIAN) */,
  "damping" REAL /* Damping percentage used in the ground motion prediction model */,
  "rsd595" REAL /* Response spectral displacement at 595 Hz (cm) */,
  "rsd575" REAL /* Response spectral displacement at 575 Hz (cm) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the earthquake event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the earthquake event */,
  "epicenter_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the epicenter */,
  "epicenter_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the epicenter */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the earthquake event (km) */,
  "fault_type" TEXT /* Type of fault (e.g., normal, reverse, strike-slip) */,
  "rupture_type" TEXT /* Type of rupture (e.g., unilateral, bilateral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_conditions" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_vs30" REAL /* Shear wave velocity at 30 meters depth (m/s) */,
  "site_z1pt0" REAL /* Depth to the bedrock at 1.0 km/s (km) */,
  "site_location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., coordinates, city, country) */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site (e.g., soil type, topography) */,
  "site_class" TEXT /* Classification of the site (e.g., rock, soil, alluvium) */,
  "site_geology" TEXT /* Geological information about the site (e.g., soil composition, layering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ground_motion_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ground motion model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the ground motion model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of ground motion model (e.g., empirical, physics-based) */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the ground motion model (e.g., coefficients, weights) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the earthquake event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the ground motion model */,
  "pga" REAL /* Peak ground acceleration (g) */,
  "pgv" REAL /* Peak ground velocity (m/s) */,
  "sa_595" REAL /* Spectral acceleration at 595 Hz (g) */,
  "sa_575" REAL /* Spectral acceleration at 575 Hz (g) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES earthquake_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES ground_motion_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the ground motion model */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the model parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the model parameter */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES ground_motion_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, policymaker) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the ground motion model */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level for the user (e.g., READ, WRITE, EXECUTE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES ground_motion_models ("model_id")
)
